en.dataForm.list.title: Data Forms
en.dataForm.create.title: Create Data Form

en.dataForm.section.parsedSummarySubtitle: Summary of sections, fields, and field types from JSON.
en.dataForm.section.validationResultSubtitl: Critical errors, warnings, and schema suggestions.
en.dataForm.section.permissionSubtitle: Configure roles allowed to create, update, import, and export.
